latestCommit.message: Remove .png and .pth files from repository tracking
Temp : Upload & Analysis video API function works
Add Docker + Caddy deploy stack with AWS provisioning scripts

Fix TimeScrubber swallowing shortcut keys when slider has focus

Range / checkbox / button inputs never produce text, so the early-return
that protects text-typing inputs was wrong to include them. After clicking
the slider, =/-/+/_/r etc were going to the input and getting eaten.

Fix Windows PowerShell profile auto-start (Layer 2)

- Use Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden for background daemon launch
  (PowerShell has no & background operator like bash)
- Fix string interpolation: $null was expanded in double-quoted strings
- Uninstall: line-based filtering instead of fragile regex

Move ApkSmith submodule from droidbot/ to project root

The submodule was unnecessarily nested at droidbot/ApkSmith/ — it is
a project-level dependency, not specific to the droidbot subdirectory.

Moved to SADroid/ApkSmith/ and replaced the sys.path hacks in both
driver files with clean imports:

  # Before (fragile, path-dependent)
  sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), 'ApkSmith', 'src'))
  from apksmith import instrument_apk  # noqa: E402

  # After (standard pip package)
  from apksmith import instrument_apk

Setup: run `pip install -e ApkSmith/` from the SADroid root to make
the apksmith package available as a normal import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all ruff lint errors + stabilise E2E test

Lint fixes (38 issues across 11 files):
- Import sorting (I001) via ruff --fix
- Line too long (E501): break strings, reflow args
- Lambda assignments (E731): convert to def functions
- Unnecessary f-strings (F541): remove extraneous f prefix
- Unused imports (F401): remove dead imports
- Nested with statements (SIM117): combine into single with
- Unnecessary mode arg (UP015): drop "r" from open()

E2E test stability fixes:
- Add force-stop before launching so onCreate always re-executes
- Enlarge logcat buffer to 4M and add 1s settle time after clear
- Replace logcat tag-based filtering (unreliable on some emulator
  images) with full drain + Python-side grep
- All 40 tests pass (39 unit + 1 E2E), CI lint clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
